Petition For Return Of Property; Conversion; Breach Of Fiduciary Duty; Constructive Fraud; Intentional Interference With Expected Inheritance; For An Accounting; Double Damages; And Attorney?S Fees
Off Calendar Apr-15-2024 Continued To May-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel appeared by zoom for Valorie Gordon (administrator).

Mr. Wrobel stated that he was informed that Vincent Yu is going to be substituting in for Mr. Roddick, that they have not had any substantive discussion, that both parties are interested in mediation and that no discovery has transpired. The Petition for Return of Property, etc., and status on close of estate are continued to May 13, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court informed Mr. Wrobel that he needs to provide an order on the demurrer. If the parties are interested in pro bono mediation, they can come in ex parte to obtain a referral from the court. If the parties decide to do mediation and they need more time to do so, they are to contact the probate examiner for an extension of time.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Thomas Wrobel appeared via zoom for Valorie Gordon (petitioner).
Robert Roddick appeared via zoom for and with Denay Brewster.

Discussion was held regarding parties being open to mediation, that parties still have outstanding discovery, and that the Court advises parties to start some discovery and talks about mediation. Both matters are continued to April 15, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-27-2023 Continued To Sep-25-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel appeared by zoom for Valorie Gordon (administrator).

Mr. Wrobel provided an oral report on how the deed on the property had been transferred by the decedent's wife Barbara Lee who is also a decedent in case number PES-22-305552. Mr. Wrobel also stated that he filed a creditor's claim in the wife's estate, that he had not realized that his creditor's claim had been rejected, and that he will be filing an 850 Petition. Status on close of estate is continued to September 25, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of the 850 Petition is set for April 24, 2023 at 9:00 in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-16-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jan-06-2015 is admitted to probate. Valorie Gordon is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Mar-27-2023 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.
